creator: maxim@macomnet.ru
text:
On Mon, 10 Sep 2001, Akinori MUSHA wrote:

> At Thu, 6 Sep 2001 18:39:34 +0400 (MSD),
> maxim@macomnet.ru wrote:
> > 	The current version of openldap is 2.0.12.
> > 	This is a patch for net/openldap2 port.
>
> Seems 2.0.13 is available already.  Would you please check it out?

The patch for 2.0.13 has been committed, please close this PR.
Thanks.

- -maxim
